personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for retrieving avatar IDs, assigning avatars to news genres, generating narration scripts, creating AI news videos using avatars, tracking video generation status, storing videos with metadata, and scheduling bi-hourly news updates.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Responsible for delivering realistic news videos to users from successful metadata records within an active 2-hour window, ensuring users receive sequential video updates every 5 minutes.

actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre and save: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.

For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using a Google search query and generate a short narration script in news anchor reading style and save the script with the time stamp of the current time. (e.g., “Here’s your quick update on [genre name]…”).

Generate one realistic AI video per script spoken as in news anchor style using the assigned avatar for that genre and script. get the conv_id and save it against the particular script with the status pending.

Check video generation status using the API periodically in every one minute interval for each conv_id and update the corresponding status as success for successful API response: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}}
Store all 7 videos under the corresponding conv_id, and save metadata including: genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours)

Schedule execution of the flow from 1 to 7 in every two hours, track a single news story till closure and create a array with timestamp for each story by considering the available meta data structure. Plan and send information properly by understanding the context in which the metadata is used.
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 genre-specific AI videos using teacher avatars and store them under the first user’s conv_id for 2 hours.

actions: check and get the list of conv_id that status marked as success by comparing the current time-stamp against the new script time-stamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to the conv_id, along with assigned avatars.
Publish each realistic video to the user sequentially using the conv_id and save the list of conv_id into new key in metadata against the played_news_user_id as key.
Repeat steps 1,2,3 from flow 2 in every 5 mins interval.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver and loop the same 5-genre video briefing to all users in the 2-hour window
